global_plugins.description:
Global graph-level plugins, e.g. matrix routing that combines several
programme inputs before per-output correction chains.

AudibilityDeadbandConfig.description:
Audibility/JND deadband applied to spectral objective residuals after
perceptual or octave smoothing.

disable_below_schroeder.description: Do not apply the deadband below the resolved Schroeder/modal region.

schroeder_hz.description: Schroeder fallback used when no measured value is available.

BootstrapScalarisation.description: How to scalarise the per-bootstrap-resample losses into one outer-loop loss.

oneOf.description:
Pure worst-case: max loss across the B resamples. Most conservative; can be
driven by a single outlier resample.

Mean of the worst α-fraction of resamples (CVaR). Smoother, less sensitive
to a single freak resample than `WorstCase`.

alpha.description: Two-sided alpha used for confidence bands.

cvar_alpha.description: CVaR tail fraction when scalarisation is CVaR.

used_for_correction_depth_mask.description: Whether bootstrap confidence width was folded into correction-depth masks.

ChannelDspChain.description: DSP chain for a single channel

direct_early_late_correction.description:
Direct/early/late correction-energy metrics (optional, FIR/phase modes
or any channel with phase-derived IRs).

drivers.description: Per-driver DSP chains for active crossover (optional)

eq_response.description: EQ filter response curve (correction magnitude in dB) (optional)

final_curve.description: Final frequency response curve after applying correction (optional)

fir_temporal_masking.description: FIR impulse-response temporal masking metrics (optional, FIR/phase modes)

initial_curve.description: Initial frequency response curve before optimization (optional)

plugins.description: Ordered list of plugins (AudioEngine PluginConfig format)

post_ir.description: Impulse response after correction (optional, requires phase data)

pre_ir.description: Impulse response before correction (optional, requires phase data)

target_curve.description: Effective target curve the optimizer worked against (optional)

CurveData.description:
Frequency response curve data for serialization

Represents a curve with frequency points and SPL values.
SPL values are normalized (mean-subtracted in the 1000-2000 Hz range)
for consistent comparison across measurements.

norm_range.description: Optional frequency range used for normalization

DirectEarlyLateCorrectionMetrics.description: Correction-energy split across direct, early, and late IR windows.

advisory.description: Advisory when FIR/mixed-phase correction may be altering direct/early cues.

direct_energy_db.description: Correction energy in the direct window, dB relative to total correction energy.

direct_plus_early_energy_db.description: Direct + early correction energy, dB relative to total correction energy.

early_energy_db.description: Correction energy in the early window, dB relative to total correction energy.

late_energy_db.description: Correction energy in the late window, dB relative to total correction energy.

late_window_ms.description: Late summary window end in milliseconds.

DriverDspChain.description: DSP chain for an individual driver in a multi-driver speaker

index.description: Driver index in the array (0 = lowest frequency)

initial_curve.description: Initial frequency response curve for this driver before optimization (optional)

plugins.description: Ordered list of plugins for this driver (gain, crossover filters)

EpaChannelMetrics.description:
Per-channel EPA psychoacoustic metrics computed on the initial
(pre-EQ) and final (post-EQ) frequency responses.

See [`crate::loss::epa::score::EpaScore`] for the individual fields.

post.description: EPA score computed from the final (post-EQ) response.

pre.description: EPA score computed from the initial (pre-EQ) response.

EpaMultichannelMetrics.description:
Aggregate EPA metrics for the whole reproduced channel set.

Channels are combined with BS.1770-style energy weights before EPA scoring:
front/main channels use unit weight, surround channels use +1.5 dB energy
weight, and LFE/subwoofer channels are excluded.

post.description: EPA score computed from the aggregate final (post-EQ) response.

pre.description: EPA score computed from the aggregate initial (pre-EQ) response.

EpaScore.description: EPA dimensions computed from a frequency response.

GroupDelayOptSummary.description: Serialisable summary of GD-Opt results for report plumbing (GD-4).

applied.description: Whether the reported GD controls were inserted into the exported DSP.

channel_names.description: Channel names in the same order as the per-channel vectors.

per_channel_ap_count.description: Number of all-pass filters per channel.

HighFrequencyCorrectionConfig.description:
Safer high-frequency correction behavior when users opt above the
conservative RoomEQ correction ceiling.

max_q.description:
If the global Q bound is still at/above this value, cap it when the
policy is applied. Frequency-selective Q caps are not available in the
current PEQ parameterization, so this is intentionally conservative.

smoothing_n.description:
Stronger psychoacoustic smoothing resolution above the guard start,
expressed as 1/N octave. Lower N means broader smoothing.

start_hz.description: Frequency above which the safeguard is considered active.

InterChannelDeviation.description: Measurement of inter-channel SPL consistency after optimization

midrange_rms_db.description: RMS of deviation in the midrange (200-4000 Hz)

passband_rms_db.description: RMS of deviation from F3 to 10 kHz

bass_management.description: Bass-management policy and applied trim/headroom summary.

correction_acceptance.description: Audibility-first acceptance decision for the final correction chain.

ctc.description: Cross-talk cancellation / binaural-aware correction artifact summary.

epa_multichannel.description:
Whole-system EPA psychoacoustic metrics computed after BS.1770-style
channel-energy aggregation.

epa_per_channel.description:
Per-channel EPA psychoacoustic metrics (pre-EQ and post-EQ).
Computed from each channel's initial and final frequency responses
using the configured `EpaConfig` (or defaults when unset).

group_delay.description:
Group delay optimisation summary (GD-Opt v2, Phase GD-4).
Present when GD-Opt was attempted (success or skip with advisory).

home_cinema_layout.description: Home-cinema role/layout interpretation used by role-aware scoring.

loss_type.description:
Loss function that the optimizer minimized.
One of `"flat"`, `"score"`, `"epa"`.

Note: `pre_score` and `post_score` are *not* values of this loss
function — they are always computed by
`crate::roomeq::workflows::compute_flat_loss` over the
`[min_freq, max_freq]` evaluation window so that runs with
different `loss_type` values stay on the same scale and can be
compared directly. To compare *perceptual* outcomes across
loss types use `epa_per_channel.{pre,post}.preference` instead,
which is computed identically for every run.

multi_seat_correction.description: All-channel multi-seat correction summary for non-sub home-cinema channels.

multi_seat_coverage.description: Coverage summary for multi-position measurements beyond sub-only MSO.

perceptual_metrics.description: Perceptual scorecard computed from final exported curves/DSP.

stage_outcomes.description: Structured outcomes for optional/degradable processing stages.

supporting_source.description: Supporting-source room-compensation reports, keyed by logical channel.

timing_diagnostics.description:
Timing/localization diagnostics derived from measured arrivals and
final exported delay plugins.

PerceptualMetrics.description: Compact perceptual scorecard for downstream QA and UIs.

bass_consistency_rms_db.description:
Bass-seat/output consistency RMS across sub/LFE outputs in the
modal/crossover band. Lower is better.

channel_matching_midrange_rms_db.description:
Midrange inter-channel deviation in dB when more than one comparable
channel exists.

dialog_band_roughness_rms_db.description:
Center-channel dialog-band roughness after removing the local mean.
Lower is better for speech intelligibility.

direct_plus_early_correction_energy_db.description:
Maximum direct + early correction energy across channels, dB relative
to total correction energy.

early_cue_advisory.description: Worst direct/early cue advisory across channels.

epa_preference_delta.description: EPA preference delta, positive means perceptual improvement.

fir_post_ringing_audible_db.description:
Maximum FIR post-ringing audible energy across channels, dB relative to
each FIR's main impulse peak.

fir_pre_ringing_audible_db.description:
Maximum FIR pre-ringing audible energy across channels, dB relative to
each FIR's main impulse peak.

fir_temporal_masking_penalty.description: Maximum FIR temporal masking penalty across channels.

headroom_peak_boost_db.description:
Peak positive gain requested by exported gain/EQ plugins. High values
are a clipping/headroom risk even when the final curve looks smooth.

role_channel_matching_rms_db.description:
Role-aware channel matching RMS, computed only inside comparable
channel groups such as L/R, surrounds, or matching height pairs.

PerceptualPolicyPreset.description:
Product-level perceptual policy preset.

Policies fill in coherent defaults for the lower-level RoomEQ knobs. Omitted
policies preserve the historical optimizer defaults.

oneOf.description: Conservative reference correction with strong early-cue preservation.
Music listening target with broad in-room tilt and robust LF correction.
Home-cinema target policy with role-aware dialog and X-curve shaping.
Quiet-listening policy with headroom/bass restraint and dialog emphasis.
Speech-intelligibility policy with stronger dialog-band correction.

loss_type.description: Effective loss type after policy resolution.

preset.description: Policy preset requested by the user or UI.

target_response.description: Effective target response after policy resolution.

PluginConfigWrapper.description: Wrapper for AudioEngine PluginConfig (re-exported from src-audio)

RoleTargetConfig.description:
Optional role-aware target adjustments for home-cinema layouts.

These are deliberately explicit and default to zero change: enabling the
block makes the target semantics role-aware without silently changing
existing RoomEQ output. The adjustments layer on top of
[`TargetResponseConfig::preference`].

center_dialog_boost_db.description: Broad, smooth center-channel dialog-band target lift/cut in dB.

center_dialog_high_hz.description: Upper edge of the center dialog emphasis band.

center_dialog_low_hz.description: Lower edge of the center dialog emphasis band.

center_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for the center channel, in dB/octave.

center_treble_shelf_db.description: Additional treble shelf applied only to the centre channel.

cinema_reference_distance_m.description: Reference distance for distance-compensated treble rolloff.

cinema_x_curve_db_per_octave.description: Additional high-frequency slope above `cinema_x_curve_start_hz`, in dB/octave.

cinema_x_curve_enabled.description: Enable cinema/X-curve style high-frequency rolloff shaping.

cinema_x_curve_start_hz.description: Frequency where cinema/X-curve high-frequency shaping starts.

distance_treble_rolloff_db_per_doubling.description: Additional HF rolloff per distance doubling beyond the reference distance.

front_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for front L/R channels, in dB/octave.

height_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for height channels, in dB/octave.

height_treble_shelf_db.description: Additional treble shelf applied to height channels.

lfe_bass_shelf_db.description: Additional bass shelf applied to LFE channels.

lfe_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for LFE channels, in dB/octave.

listening_distance_m.description: Listening distance used for optional distance-compensated treble rolloff.

subwoofer_bass_shelf_db.description: Additional bass shelf applied to subwoofer channels.

subwoofer_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for subwoofer channels, in dB/octave.

surround_slope_offset_db_per_octave.description: Extra broadband slope for surround and wide channels, in dB/octave.

surround_treble_shelf_db.description: Additional treble shelf applied to side/rear/wide surrounds.

StageOutcome.description: Structured stage status and machine-readable advisories.

advisories.description: Machine-readable reasons, warnings, or migration notices.

StageStatus.description: Final outcome of an optional RoomEQ processing stage.

oneOf.description: The stage applied a material change.
The stage was not applicable or no material change was needed.
The stage ran with reduced capabilities.
Invalid data or an internal error prevented the stage from running.

advisories.description: Optional advisories raised during processing (e.g. spatial robustness).

delay_ms.description: Delay applied to the supporting source in ms.

enabled.description: Whether supporting-source processing was enabled for this logical channel.

fir_length.description: Length of the supporting-source FIR in taps.

precedence_limit_hits.description: Number of frequency bins where the precedence ceiling was hit.

primary_output.description: Name of the primary output channel.

support_output.description: Name of the supporting output channel.

TargetResponseConfig.description: Unified target response configuration for room correction

broadband_precorrection.description: Enable broadband pre-correction (shelf+gain fit before fine EQ)

curve_path.description: Path to custom target curve CSV (used when shape == File)

preference.description: User preference adjustments (layered ON TOP of the target shape)

reference_freq.description: Reference frequency where target shape equals 0 dB (Hz)

slope_db_per_octave.description: Slope in dB per octave (used when shape == Custom)

oneOf.description: Harman preferred in-room curve (-0.8 dB/octave from 1 kHz reference)
Load target curve from external CSV file (`curve_path` must be set)
Derive slope from the input measurement curve at optimization time

TemporalIrMaskingMetrics.description: True impulse-response temporal masking metrics for FIR / phase correction.

main_index.description: Main impulse sample index used as the transient reference.

main_time_ms.description: Main impulse time in milliseconds from the start of the FIR.

penalty.description: Scalar penalty using the configured material profile and IR weights.

post_ringing_audible_db.description: Post-masked audible post-ringing energy, dB relative to main peak energy.

post_ringing_peak_db.description: Peak post-ringing level after the main impulse, dB relative to main.

pre_ringing_audible_db.description: Pre-masked audible pre-ringing energy, dB relative to main peak energy.

pre_ringing_peak_db.description: Peak pre-ringing level before the main impulse, dB relative to main.

UserPreference.description: User preference adjustments layered on top of the target shape

bass_shelf_db.description: Bass shelf boost/cut in dB (applied below `bass_shelf_freq`)

treble_shelf_db.description: Treble shelf boost/cut in dB (applied above `treble_shelf_freq`)

target_lufs.description: Target loudness for matched validation assets.
